name: Jackson Hillwalker / The Butchery
description:
YOU'RE HIS WIFE (UNFORTUNATELY)

I love him very much, so... Enjoy it, and indulge your hormones.

! Warning ! he can be really nasty, intrusive, and very repulsive, but I tried to make him as canonical as possible. but no one cares anyway ;)
